content: (Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): The scene shows a dark, stone room with a high arching ceiling. The walls are made of large, rough-hewn stones and there are several pillars throughout the room. MJR is holding a crossbow, which is cocked and ready to fire. The crossbow has a red circle on its stock, and MJR's hand is wrapped around the grip. MJR's view is from behind the crossbow, suggesting that they are the one holding it.)
